summary: Iteration 40 - Backend Refactoring Tests Complete. All 16 tests passed. Verified: 1) GET /api/profit/summary uses unified get_user_financial_summary() utility, 2) POST /api/profit/simulate-withdrawal uses unified calculate_account_value() utility, 3) Licensee account_value comes from license.current_amount, 4) Regular user account_value is calculated as deposits - withdrawals + profits, 5) All existing functionality still works after refactoring (no regression).
critical_code_review_comments: calculate_account_value() (lines 6-54 in calculations.py) correctly handles both licensees and regular users
get_user_financial_summary() (lines 57-117 in calculations.py) provides comprehensive financial data
GET /api/profit/summary (lines 991-1008 in server.py) correctly uses get_user_financial_summary()
POST /api/profit/simulate-withdrawal (lines 1019-1036 in server.py) correctly uses calculate_account_value()
database.py module created for future route migration (not yet integrated - as expected)
Import statements use relative imports from utils.calculations which is correct
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring complete. Unified calculation utilities in /app/backend/utils/calculations.py. database.py module created but not yet integrated into server.py (preparation for future route migration). All profit-related endpoints verified working correctly.

profit_summary_unified_calculation.details: GET /api/profit/summary uses get_user_financial_summary() utility. Returns correct structure with total_deposits, total_projected_profit, total_actual_profit, profit_difference, account_value, total_trades, performance_rate, is_licensee, license_type.

simulate_withdrawal_unified_calculation.details: POST /api/profit/simulate-withdrawal uses calculate_account_value() utility. Returns correct fee calculations (3% Merin fee) and balance information.

licensee_account_value_from_license.details: Licensee account_value correctly comes from license.current_amount. Verified via code review and license data inspection.

regular_user_account_value_calculation.details: Regular user account_value correctly calculated as deposits - withdrawals + profits. Verified: 18252.24 + 299.9 = 18552.14

account_value_consistency.details: account_value is consistent between profit summary (18552.14) and withdrawal simulation current_balance (18552.14)
